scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web; wait
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w api
scripts.test: npm run test -w api && npm run test -w web && npm run test -w desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run dist -w desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run dist:win -w desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run dist:linux -w desktop
scripts.screenshots:install: npm install --prefix e2e && npm run install:browsers --prefix e2e
